summary: Multi-Organization Architecture Testing Complete. All backend APIs working correctly (14/14 tests passed). Frontend UI verified - login as org_admin returns role=org_admin, Team page shows management buttons, Organizations page accessible with stats and org cards, Create/View Organization functionality working.
seed_data_creation: Test organizations and users created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-organization architecture fully tested. Role hierarchy: org_admin > admin > user/agent > viewer. Organizations page only visible to org_admin users in sidebar.

login_org_admin.description: Login as org_admin (admin@merchant.com/admin123) returns role=org_admin in response

team_page_buttons.description: Team page shows 'Add User', 'Invite Member', and 'Bulk Upload' buttons for org_admin users
team_page_buttons.evidence: Screenshot shows all three buttons in header

organizations_page_access.description: Organizations page accessible only to org_admin users, shows in sidebar only for org_admin

organizations_stats.description: Stats cards show: Organizations count, Total Users, Org Admins, Total Clients

organizations_list.description: Organization cards displayed with name, description, user count, and View Details button

create_organization.description: Create Organization dialog with name and description fields, success toast shown after creation

view_organization_details.description: View Details dialog shows org info, users list with roles, Add User and Delete buttons

add_user_to_organization.description: Add User dialog with name, email, password, role fields. Backend API working correctly.

remove_user_from_organization.description: Remove user functionality working via backend API

access_control.description: Non-org_admin users correctly denied access to organization management endpoints (403 Forbidden)
